ingredients: COMPOSITION: Meat and animal derivatives (chicken 8%), cereals, minerals, oils and fats, derivatives of vegetable origin. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Protein 5.6%, Fat content 3.2%, Crude fibre 0.38%, Crude ash 1.3%, Moisture 80.0%, Calcium 0.21%, Phosphorus 0.14%, Sodium 0.07%, Potassium 0.17%, Magnesium 0.02%; per kg: Vitamin A 16,671IU, Vitamin D3 273IU. ADDITIVES PER KG: Nutritional additives: 3b103 (Iron) 10.1mg, 3b202 (Iodine) 0.3mg, 3b405 (Copper) 1.7mg, 3b502 (Manganese) 2.2mg, 3b603 (Zinc) 26.0mg.
